medium_findings.code_snippet: const panel = vscode.window.createWebviewPanel('freeRequestEditor', tabTitle, vscode.ViewColumn.One, { enableScripts: true, retainContextWhenHidden: true });
const panel = vscode.window.createWebviewPanel('freeRequestResponse', `响应: ${request.name} (${response.status})`, vscode.ViewColumn.Two, { enableScripts: true });
